chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6319 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.28168/2024 2. For orders on office objection No.22 3. For orders on Misc. No.28169/2024 4. For orders on Misc. No.28170/2024 5. For hearing of main case 20.12.2024 Mr. Aleem Akhtar Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2-5. Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution is available to aggrieved person, however, learned counsel has remained unable to befall a petitioner within the said category and prima facie could not demonstrate a locus standi to maintain this petition. Petition along with listed applications is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
